summary: Verified Outreach Lead Lists CRUD + UI wiring (iter50). Removed-wrapper navigation, Save-to-list bulk action, AI Writer Lead List dropdown all confirmed working end-to-end. Backend: 6/6 pytest pass. Frontend: full flow validated via Playwright.

issues: React hydration warning: an <option> element contains a <span> child (invalid HTML). Output: 'TESTLIST_12361 · 2 lead(s)' looks correct visually but the bullet/badge appears wrapped in a <span> inside <option>. Move the extra markup outside <option> or render plain text only.

action_items: Fix the invalid <span> inside <option> in AI Writer Lead List dropdown (Outreach.jsx ~line 1666-1678) to remove React hydration warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Outreach.jsx is 1820 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Should be split into per-tab files (LeadsTab, AiWriterTab, CampaignsTab, etc.) for maintainability.
LeadsHub.jsx is now a thin 12-line wrapper — consider removing it and routing /app/leads directly to <Outreach/> in App.js to drop a redundant indirection.
Lead Lists endpoints work fine but lack ownership checks (any privileged user can read/delete all lists). Acceptable for current MVP but flag for RBAC hardening.
<option> child <span> is an HTML spec violation — see frontend design_issues above.
frontend_issues.seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ll_* leads and TESTLIST_* lists ephemerally and clean them up in-test.
frontend_issues.context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead Lists CRUD + UI integration validated. Pytest: /app/backend/tests/test_lead_lists.py. Playwright validated: direct /app/leads -> page-outreach (no wrapper), out-tab-leads Save-as-Lead-List bulk modal, AI Writer ai-lead-list dropdown populates and selection persists. Only cosmetic React hydration warning remains.
